text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (One last night before tryouts...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sorry to make you wait. Just a little longer now... just a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, I'm going to win, make my debut... and then I'll bring back
lots and lots of victories for you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You can count on your big sister, okay?

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: So it was you?

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text:
The one who wanted to run, who wanted to win. The one who had so
much fun... and felt so lonely.

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: That was all you? Tell me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's long-awaited tryout race is about to begin. Trainers
pack the stands, expectant eyes glued to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm no exception, of course, but at the same time...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'll win. No matter what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After what I saw that night, I can't help but feel as concerned as I am
excited.
choice_data_list: (I've got a bad feeling about this.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All the same, the starting gates fly open, and the race begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I'm going to win... I need to win.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
When I looked into it, I found out my sister and I were truly in a bad
situation. One of us was definitely not going to make it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
My survival was a mere coincidence. Or maybe... it was a miracle from
my sister.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And that's why...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now they've rounded the final corner and come onto the
homestretch! Leading the way is number nine, with the popular
Admire Vega in fifth!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's getting boxed in, looks like. Might be difficult to
position herself here.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (No... No! Victory is the only acceptable outcome! Because I...)

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text:
You... you would've really liked running, right? You'd want to run and
win, if you could have your way.

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: Then... then I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: I'll make all that happen for you.

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: Because I'm your big sister!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I'm going to keep running, keep winning, and keep earning her
glory!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That's why I'm here—the only reason! That's why I'm alive!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaghhh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Cutting in toward the inside and charging hard is Admire Vega! Now
in third, second... first! Wh-what an incredible burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, did she just...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's done it! First place in the tryout race goes to Admire Vega!
Admire Vega!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her incredible late rally sends the crowd into a fever pitch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Which is soon followed by uneasy murmurs.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff A
text_block_list.text:
This is an announcement regarding the most recent race. Admire
Vega, due to interference on the final straight, has been demoted to
fourth.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega runs from the commotion, without so much as a word to
any trainer.
